haiku_classifier._doc: Optional Haiku-based intent classifier. When enabled, the hook falls back to a Haiku call if keyword matching produces no hit. Haiku reads the user prompt + persona catalog and returns a structured suggestion. Adds ~1–2s latency per non-keyword-matching prompt and ~$0.001 quota each. Set enabled=true to opt in. The keyword path always runs first (cheap and deterministic); Haiku is the no-keyword fallback only.
